Treatment Class.value: Immune checkpoint inhibitors and Tyrosine kinase inhibitors
Treatment Class.reasoning: The trial compared nivolumab plus ipilimumab (immune checkpoint inhibitors) with sunitinib (a tyrosine kinase inhibitor) for advanced renal-cell carcinoma. Nivolumab is described as a 'programmed death 1 (PD-1) immune checkpoint inhibitor antibody' and ipilimumab as an 'anti-cytotoxic T-lymphocyte-associated antigen 4 antibody' on page 2. Sunitinib is described as a 'vascular endothelial growth factor receptor tyrosine kinase inhibitor' on page 2.
